sales.description:
Ancients
Diva Faustina Senior (AD 138-140/141). AV aureus (19mm, 7.32 gm, 6h). NGC Choice AU 5/5 - 4/5. Rome, ca. AD 141-161. DIVA FAVSTINA, draped bust of Diva Faustina Senior right, seen from front, hair elaborately waved in several loops around head under thin band, braided, drawn up, and coiled on top with pearls / AET-ER-NITAS, Fortuna standing facing, head left, patera in outstretched right hand, rudder in left.
